function.name: get_absolute_path
function.description: Get the absolute path of a file or directory.
function.long_description: Converts a relative path to an absolute path and checks if it exists.
example_user_queries: Show me the absolute path for ./capabilities/news/get_trending_topics.json.
What is the full path of ./capabilities/file_metadata/get_file_owner.json?
Give me the absolute path for ./capabilities/stock/compare_stocks.json.
Find the full filesystem path of ./capabilities/health/calculate_bmi.json.
